response.justification: Maria Rodriguez demonstrates strong full-stack and cloud engineering skills with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, aligning partially with the GenAI/cloud focus. However, the resume lacks explicit depth in production-grade AI/ML systems, RAG architectures, or vector databases, which are core to the role. Her leadership in technical discovery and mentorship is evident, but the AI-specific experience is less pronounced than required.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with TypeScript and cloud platforms (AWS), relevant to integration and infrastructure work.
Proven leadership in technical discovery, mentorship, and cross-functional collaboration, aligning with customer-facing responsibilities.
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators) and open-source projects, showing adaptability to emerging technologies.
concerns: Limited explicit experience with production-grade AI/ML systems or RAG architectures, a core requirement for the role.
No mention of vector databases or LLM performance optimization, which are critical for GenAI workflows.
Diverse but fragmented project history, raising questions about sustained focus on AI/cloud infrastructure delivery.
